response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON provided lyrics for '咲き誇れアイドル', which matches the second half of the video (starting ~02:26). However, the first half contains a different song, '恥ずかしいか青春は', which was not in the JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the JSON for the second song's lyrics and manual transcription for the first song and on-screen text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles strictly to vocal bursts. Applied aggressive truncation for rapid-fire lyrics to prevent cascading delays. Subtitled on-screen visual text during instrumental breaks.
